notes: B0010.r40 restores the proven B008 R2 Wi-Fi screen and single-owner connect/scan workflow while retaining the current 16 MB A/B OTA partition map. ESP-Hosted C6 2.12.9 initializes before history, MIPI-DSI and LVGL allocations. Full power-on uses the guarded restart plus a second six-second C6 hold; OTA, USB and rear resets retain the standard six-second hold. Saves up to 10 Wi-Fi profiles in application NVS. No C6 updater or embedded C6 binary.
